_readme: Manual event matching overrides. Takes precedence over automatic matching. Run 'node build_all.js' to apply.

_schema.force_match: Force two events to be matched. Both must exist in their respective year's active events.
_schema.force_no_match: Prevent an event from matching anything. Use sid_baseline to force Attrited, sid_analysis to force New.
_schema.force_segment: Override a matched or unmatched event's segment classification.

force_match._comment_example: Uncomment below to force a match. Remove leading _ from keys to activate.
force_match._note: Name changed significantly between years but confirmed same event series

force_no_match._comment_example: Uncomment to force an event to Attrited (sid_baseline) or New (sid_analysis)
force_no_match._note: Confirmed permanently cancelled — not a scheduling shift

force_segment._comment_example: Override a segment. Valid values: Retained, Shifted, Attrited, New, Recovered, Tried to Return
force_segment._note: Algorithm fuzzy-matched incorrectly — this event is truly gone
